summary: Comprehensive testing of DOMMMA V2 new features completed. All backend APIs (100% - 23/23 tests passed) and frontend features (100% working) are functional. Firebase Analytics initialized on app load, NotificationBell with enable notifications flow, Applications page with stats, Maintenance page with category filters and modal, Jobs page with role-based features all working correctly.

issues: React useEffect dependencies warnings - recommend adding missing dependencies or using useCallback (no functional impact)

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint (/api/) returns DOMMMA V2 message
Backend: FCM token update for existing user
Backend: Update application status (pending -> under_review -> approved)
Backend: Update maintenance status (open -> in_progress -> completed)
Frontend: Homepage loads with DOMMMA branding and Firebase Analytics initialized
Frontend: Dashboard loads with NotificationBell in header
Frontend: NotificationBell dropdown opens with 'Enable Notifications' prompt
Frontend: Applications page - 'My Applications' header visible (renter)
Frontend: Applications page - Stats cards (Total, Pending, Under Review, Approved)
Frontend: Applications page - 'Browse Properties' button for renters
Frontend: Maintenance page - Category filters (Plumbing, Electrical, HVAC, Pest, Other)
Frontend: Maintenance page - 'New Request' button visible
Frontend: Maintenance modal - Title input, Description input, Submit button
Frontend: Jobs page (Contractor) - 'Available Jobs' tab, 'My Jobs' tab
Frontend: Jobs page (Contractor) - Stats (Available Jobs, Open for Bids, My Jobs, Completed)
Frontend: Jobs page (Contractor) - Submit Bid buttons on job cards
Frontend: Jobs page (Landlord) - 'Post Job' button visible
Frontend: Post Job modal - Form fields (Title, Category, Location, Budget, Deadline, Description)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React useEffect dependencies warnings in Applications.jsx, Documents.jsx, Jobs.jsx, Maintenance.jsx, Messages.jsx, Payments.jsx - recommend adding missing dependencies to useEffect arrays or using useCallback
seed_data_creation: Created test listings, applications, maintenance requests, and jobs via API during test execution (all prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 features tested and working: Firebase Analytics/FCM push notification setup complete with NotificationBell component showing enable prompt. Rental Applications workflow (submit, track, landlord review with status updates). Maintenance Request system with category filters (Plumbing, Electrical, Appliance, HVAC, Structural, Pest, Other) and priority levels. Contractor Job Marketplace with bidding system - contractors see 'Submit Bid', landlords see 'Post Job'. Role-based navigation working: Renters see Applications/Maintenance, Contractors see Jobs, Landlords see all.

Firebase Analytics/FCM.details: Firebase initialized on app load, NotificationBell in dashboard header, Enable Notifications flow working, FCM token registration API functional

Rental Applications.details: Applications page with stats (Total, Pending, Under Review, Approved), Browse Properties button for renters, landlord can update status via API

Maintenance Requests.details: Category filters (7 categories), New Request button and modal with form fields, priority selection, status updates via API

Contractor Job Marketplace.details: Available Jobs and My Jobs tabs, job cards with budget/deadline info, Submit Bid for contractors, Post Job for landlords, bid selection working

Role-Based Navigation.details: Renters see Applications/Maintenance, Contractors see Jobs, Landlords see Applications/Maintenance/Jobs with Post Job button
